query: SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') as cpf_norm, id, nomeCompleto, cpfCnpj FROM clientes WHERE REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') IN (SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') FROM clientes GROUP BY REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY cpf_norm;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') as cpf_norm, id, nomeCompleto, cpfCnpj FROM clientes WHERE REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') IN (SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') FROM clientes GROUP BY REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY cpf_norm;
